name: Demetri Martin
blurb: A former contributor on The Daily Show, he won the Perrier Award at the 2003 Edinburgh Festival Fringe and hosted the Comedy Central sketch series Important Things With Demetri Martin.
bio: Demetri Martin is an American comedian known for deadpan one-liners, drawings presented on a large pad, and jokes accompanied by guitar and harmonica. A former contributor on The Daily Show, he won the Perrier Award at the 2003 Edinburgh Festival Fringe and hosted the Comedy Central sketch series Important Things With Demetri Martin. He left law school at NYU to pursue comedy in 1997.

timeline.ev: Leaves NYU law school and begins performing stand-up
Wins the Perrier Award at the Edinburgh Festival Fringe for If I
Releases the comedy album These Are Jokes
Important Things With Demetri Martin premieres on Comedy Central
Releases the special Demetri Martin. Standup Comedian.

accolades: Perrier Comedy Award, 2003 Edinburgh Festival Fringe
Barry Award, 2006 Melbourne International Comedy Festival
Writers Guild of America Award for Late Night with Conan OBrien

bits.yt_title: Demetri Martin’s Guide To Being Funnier | Comedy Central Presents
